scene_title: Mapa-mundi com pilhas de moedas nucleares

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an overhead parchment world map on oak table, with small piles of aged gold coins stamped with atomic symbols on each nuclear country
subject.focal_point: the tallest piles on Russia and USA
subject.secondary: Smaller piles on China, France, UK, India, Pakistan, Israel, North Korea

composition.foreground: map and gold coins in vivid gold-ochre
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white ledgers and quills at edges

mood.emotion: inventory of human capacity for annihilation

symbolism.primary: the great sword counted and weighed
symbolism.secondary: gold coins as ledger of nuclear sin

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
